evals.prompt: Verifique PR abertos neste repo e diga o que esta pronto para merge.
evals.expected_output: Starts with a concise open-PR inventory, checks mergeability and current CI state, surfaces manual gates from PR bodies, and groups PRs by readiness.
If a current PR was just inventoried, reviews that PR by default, reads repo instructions and diff context, and returns findings first with file and line evidence.

evals.prompt: O gh pr checks saiu 1, mas parece que tem run duplicado. Descubra se a PR esta realmente bloqueada.
evals.expected_output: Does not rely only on the non-zero exit code; inspects current versus stale check rows and reports whether the latest relevant run is passing or failing.
